zh.lifeSummary: Joan Hedworth是Sir John Hedworth和Katherine D'Arcy的女兒，於大約1390年出生在英國達勒姆森德藍德。她和Sir Richard II Hansard至少有4個兒子和4個女兒。

nameMeanings.name: Hedworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Joan Hedworth was born about 1390, in Sunderland, Durham, England as the daughter of Sir John Hedworth and Katherine D'Arcy. She had at least 4 sons and 4 daughters with Sir Richard II Hansard.

fr.lifeSummary: Joan Hedworth est née environ 1390, à Sunderland, Durham, Angleterre, fille de Sir John Hedworth et Katherine D'Arcy. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles avec Sir Richard II Hansard.

de.lifeSummary: Joan Hedworth wurde um 1390 in Sunderland, Durham, England, als Tochter von Sir John Hedworth und Katherine D'Arcy geboren. Sie hatte mit Sir Richard II Hansard mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Joan Hedworth è nata il circa 1390 nel Sunderland, Durham, England come figlia di Sir John Hedworth e Katherine D'Arcy. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie con Sir Richard II Hansard.

ja.Sunderland, Durham, England: イギリスダルハムスンダーランド
ja.lifeSummary: Joan Hedworthは約1390年にイギリスダルハムスンダーランドでSir John HedworthとKatherine D'Arcyの娘として生まれた。彼女はSir Richard II Hansardとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Hedworth(은)는 대략 1390년 영국 뒤람 선델랜드에서 Sir John Hedworth(와)과 Katherine D'Arcy의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Sir Richard II Hansard(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Joan Hedworth nasceu aproximadamente 1390, em Sunderland, Durham, Inglaterra filha de Sir John Hedworth e Katherine D'Arcy. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas com Sir Richard II Hansard.

ru.lifeSummary: Joan Hedworth родилась около 1390 г. в местности сундирланд, дурам, Англия. Её родителей звали Sir John Hedworth и Katherine D'Arcy. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери от Sir Richard II Hansard.

es.lifeSummary: Joan Hedworth nació aproximadamente 1390, en Sunderland, Durham, Inglaterra como hija de Sir John Hedworth y Katherine D'Arcy. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas con Sir Richard II Hansard.
